---
title: "cellNexus"
author: "Mangiola et al."
package: cellNexus
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{cellNexus}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---



<!-- badges: start -->
[![Lifecycle:maturing](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-maturing-blue.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#maturing)
<!-- badges: end -->

# Introduction

`cellNexus` extends the functionality of `CuratedAtlasQueryR` by providing a unified interface for querying and accessing the harmonised, curated, and reannotated CELLxGENE human cell atlas. It enables reproducible, programmatic exploration of large-scale single-cell datasets, supporting data retrieval at the cell, sample, and dataset levels with flexible filtering based on tissue, cell type, experimental condition, and other metadata. Retrieved data are returned in formats ready for downstream analysis.

The package integrates over 44 million human cells processed through a standardised pipeline, including consistent quality control, normalisation, and unified abundance representations (e.g., single-cell, counts-per-million, normalised expression, and pseudobulk). This harmonisation facilitates efficient cross-dataset comparison and integration.

Data are hosted on the ARDC Nectar Research Cloud, and most functions access them via web requests; therefore, an active network connection is required for typical use.

While both cellNexus and CuratedAtlasQueryR rely on precomputed expression layers, cellNexus adopts a more standardised and transparent processing workflow. This includes explicit removal of empty droplets and dead cells, followed by harmonised quality control, normalisation, and multi-layer data generation, ensuring alignment with evolving CELLxGENE releases.


<img src="../man/figures/logo.png" alt="" width="120px" height="139px" />

<img src="../man/figures/svcf_logo.jpeg" alt="" width="155px" height="58px" /><img src="../man/figures/czi_logo.png" alt="" width="129px" height="58px" /><img src="../man/figures/bioconductor_logo.jpg" alt="" width="202px" height="58px" /><img src="../man/figures/vca_logo.png" alt="" width="219px" height="58px" /><img src="../man/figures/nectar_logo.png" alt="" width="180px" height="58px" /><img src="../man/figures/CSL_Limited_logo.svg.png" alt="" width="120px" height="58px" />

# Query interface

## Installation


``` r
devtools::install_github("MangiolaLaboratory/cellNexus")
```

## Load the package


``` r
library(cellNexus)
```

## Load additional packages


``` r
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
})
```

## Load and explore the metadata

### Load the metadata
By default, `get_metadata()` loads harmonised annotations. Users can retrieve original Census annotations by the function `join_census_table()`. 


``` r
metadata <- get_metadata() |>
  join_census_table()
metadata
#> # Source:   SQL [?? x 76]
#> # Database: DuckDB v1.2.2 [shen.m@Darwin 23.3.0:R 4.5.0/:memory:]
#>    cell_id observation_joinid dataset_id         sample_id sample_ experiment___
#>      <dbl> <chr>              <chr>              <chr>     <chr>   <chr>        
#>  1    6839 POgui6S7Qc         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#>  2    1188 M<;(?MCuvK         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#>  3    5977 mxxJIMO(>%         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#>  4    1354 lyk~4=PiJN         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#>  5    6941 nIPq0(%KG4         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#>  6    1369 g%W<a6~cuI         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#>  7    6039 i#P4h3reUd         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#>  8    6058 @q{PQhX(w<         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#>  9    1080 Jni_4fwaDJ         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#> 10    1490 LvD8{%=`Z(         b693123e-95e6-433… 76a27a0f… 76a27a… ""           
#> # ℹ more rows
#> # ℹ 70 more variables: run_from_cell_id <chr>, sample_heuristic <chr>,
#> #   age_days <int>, tissue_groups <chr>, nFeature_expressed_in_sample <int>,
#> #   nCount_RNA <dbl>, empty_droplet <lgl>, cell_type_unified_ensemble <chr>,
#> #   is_immune <lgl>, subsets_Mito_percent <int>, subsets_Ribo_percent <int>,
#> #   high_mitochondrion <lgl>, high_ribosome <lgl>, scDblFinder.class <chr>,
#> #   sample_chunk <int>, cell_chunk <int>, sample_pseudobulk_chunk <int>, …
```

Metadata is saved to `get_default_cache_dir()` unless a custom path is provided via the cache_directory argument. The `metadata` variable can then be re-used for all subsequent queries. 

### Explore the tissue 


``` r
metadata |>
  dplyr::distinct(tissue, cell_type_unified_ensemble)
#> # Source:   SQL [?? x 2]
#> # Database: DuckDB v1.2.2 [shen.m@Darwin 23.3.0:R 4.5.0/:memory:]
#>    tissue     cell_type_unified_ensemble
#>    <chr>      <chr>                     
#>  1 lung       endothelial               
#>  2 lung       immune                    
#>  3 lung       cd4 th17 em               
#>  4 cerebellum glial                     
#>  5 blood      cd4 th17 em               
#>  6 blood      cd4 fh em                 
#>  7 blood      cd4 tcm                   
#>  8 liver      cd14 mono                 
#>  9 liver      monocytic                 
#> 10 liver      cd8 tcm                   
#> # ℹ more rows
```

## Quality control
cellNexus metadata applies standardised quality control to filter out empty droplets, dead or damaged cells, doublets, and samples with low gene counts.


``` r
metadata <- metadata |>
  keep_quality_cells()

metadata <- metadata |>
  dplyr::filter(feature_count >= 5000)
```


## Download single-cell RNA sequencing counts 

### Query raw counts


``` r
single_cell_counts <-
  metadata |>
  dplyr::filter(
    self_reported_ethnicity == "African American" &
      assay == "10x 3' v3" &
      tissue == "breast" &
      cell_type == "T cell"
  ) |>
  get_single_cell_experiment()
#> ℹ Realising metadata.
#> ℹ Synchronising files
#> ℹ Reading files.
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading counts ■■■■                              10% | ETA: 31s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading counts ■■■■■■■                           20% | ETA: 28s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading counts ■■■■■■■■■■                        30% | ETA: 18s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading counts ■■■■■■■■■■■■■                     40% | ETA: 13s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading counts ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■                  50% | ETA:  9s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading counts ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■               60% | ETA:  6s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading counts ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■            70% | ETA:  4s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading counts ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■      90% | ETA:  1s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> [KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> ℹ Compiling Experiment.

single_cell_counts
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> # A SingleCellExperiment-tibble abstraction: 2,908 × 77
#> # [90mFeatures=33145 | Cells=2908 | Assays=counts[0m
#>    .cell observation_joinid dataset_id           sample_id sample_ experiment___
#>    <chr> <chr>              <chr>                <chr>     <chr>   <chr>        
#>  1 76_1  bTlx!HK=oS         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  2 80_1  zz-!e5_XAo         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 1de3f3ba… 1de3f3… ""           
#>  3 75_1  F9G7A+GgjA         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… db5a69ed… db5a69… ""           
#>  4 78_1  +q?29B%2nH         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  5 77_1  E4g5+)v;AV         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  6 1_1   I8a42<8st4         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 184fa234… 184fa2… ""           
#>  7 81_1  -mb&DWckf(         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 1de3f3ba… 1de3f3… ""           
#>  8 79_1  zuJ#MBMWy;         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  9 72_1  8wGs7JgUjj         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 6b194412… 6b1944… ""           
#> 10 22_2  2lQ`<&l3-A         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 30967738… 309677… ""           
#> # ℹ 2,898 more rows
#> # ℹ 71 more variables: run_from_cell_id <chr>, sample_heuristic <chr>,
#> #   age_days <int>, tissue_groups <chr>, nFeature_expressed_in_sample <int>,
#> #   nCount_RNA <dbl>, empty_droplet <lgl>, cell_type_unified_ensemble <chr>,
#> #   is_immune <lgl>, subsets_Mito_percent <int>, subsets_Ribo_percent <int>,
#> #   high_mitochondrion <lgl>, high_ribosome <lgl>, scDblFinder.class <chr>,
#> #   sample_chunk <int>, cell_chunk <int>, sample_pseudobulk_chunk <int>, …
```

### Query counts scaled per million


``` r
single_cell_cpm <-
  metadata |>
  dplyr::filter(
    self_reported_ethnicity == "African American" &
      assay == "10x 3' v3" &
      tissue == "breast" &
      cell_type == "T cell"
  ) |>
  get_single_cell_experiment(assays = "cpm")
#> ℹ Realising metadata.
#> ℹ Synchronising files
#> ℹ Reading files.
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading cpm ■■■■                              10% | ETA: 19s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading cpm ■■■■■■■                           20% | ETA: 12s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading cpm ■■■■■■■■■■                        30% | ETA: 10s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading cpm ■■■■■■■■■■■■■                     40% | ETA:  9s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading cpm ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■                  50% | ETA:  6s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading cpm ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■               60% | ETA:  4s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading cpm ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■            70% | ETA:  3s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading cpm ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■         80% | ETA:  2s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> [KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> ℹ Compiling Experiment.

single_cell_cpm
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> # A SingleCellExperiment-tibble abstraction: 2,908 × 77
#> # [90mFeatures=33145 | Cells=2908 | Assays=cpm[0m
#>    .cell observation_joinid dataset_id           sample_id sample_ experiment___
#>    <chr> <chr>              <chr>                <chr>     <chr>   <chr>        
#>  1 76_1  bTlx!HK=oS         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  2 75_1  F9G7A+GgjA         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… db5a69ed… db5a69… ""           
#>  3 80_1  zz-!e5_XAo         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 1de3f3ba… 1de3f3… ""           
#>  4 78_1  +q?29B%2nH         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  5 1_1   I8a42<8st4         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 184fa234… 184fa2… ""           
#>  6 81_1  -mb&DWckf(         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 1de3f3ba… 1de3f3… ""           
#>  7 79_1  zuJ#MBMWy;         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  8 77_1  E4g5+)v;AV         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  9 72_1  8wGs7JgUjj         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 6b194412… 6b1944… ""           
#> 10 2_2   5gk;5Eb#IO         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… b8c6eb56… b8c6eb… ""           
#> # ℹ 2,898 more rows
#> # ℹ 71 more variables: run_from_cell_id <chr>, sample_heuristic <chr>,
#> #   age_days <int>, tissue_groups <chr>, nFeature_expressed_in_sample <int>,
#> #   nCount_RNA <dbl>, empty_droplet <lgl>, cell_type_unified_ensemble <chr>,
#> #   is_immune <lgl>, subsets_Mito_percent <int>, subsets_Ribo_percent <int>,
#> #   high_mitochondrion <lgl>, high_ribosome <lgl>, scDblFinder.class <chr>,
#> #   sample_chunk <int>, cell_chunk <int>, sample_pseudobulk_chunk <int>, …
```

### Query SCT normalised counts

``` r
single_cell_sct <-
  metadata |>
  dplyr::filter(
    self_reported_ethnicity == "African American" &
      assay == "10x 3' v3" &
      tissue == "breast" &
      cell_type == "T cell"
  ) |>
  get_single_cell_experiment(assays = "sct")
#> ℹ Realising metadata.
#> ℹ Synchronising files
#> ℹ Reading files.
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■                              10% | ETA: 30s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■■■■                           20% | ETA: 15s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■■■■■■■                        30% | ETA: 10s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■■■■■■■■■■                     40% | ETA:  7s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■                  50% | ETA:  5s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■               60% | ETA:  4s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■            70% | ETA:  2s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■         80% | ETA:  1s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Reading sct ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■      90% | ETA:  1s[KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> [KFound more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> ℹ Compiling Experiment.

single_cell_sct
#> Found more than one class "package_version" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'alabaster.base'
#> Also defined by 'SeuratObject'
#> # A SingleCellExperiment-tibble abstraction: 2,908 × 77
#> # [90mFeatures=33145 | Cells=2908 | Assays=sct[0m
#>    .cell observation_joinid dataset_id           sample_id sample_ experiment___
#>    <chr> <chr>              <chr>                <chr>     <chr>   <chr>        
#>  1 76_1  bTlx!HK=oS         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  2 78_1  +q?29B%2nH         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  3 75_1  F9G7A+GgjA         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… db5a69ed… db5a69… ""           
#>  4 80_1  zz-!e5_XAo         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 1de3f3ba… 1de3f3… ""           
#>  5 79_1  zuJ#MBMWy;         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  6 77_1  E4g5+)v;AV         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 52ab9222… 52ab92… ""           
#>  7 81_1  -mb&DWckf(         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 1de3f3ba… 1de3f3… ""           
#>  8 72_1  8wGs7JgUjj         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 6b194412… 6b1944… ""           
#>  9 1_1   I8a42<8st4         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… 184fa234… 184fa2… ""           
#> 10 2_2   5gk;5Eb#IO         842c6f5d-4a94-4eef-… b8c6eb56… b8c6eb… ""           
#> # ℹ 2,898 more rows
#> # ℹ 71 more variables: run_from_cell_id <chr>, sample_heuristic <chr>,
#> #   age_days <int>, tissue_groups <chr>, nFeature_expressed_in_sample <int>,
#> #   nCount_RNA <dbl>, empty_droplet <lgl>, cell_type_unified_ensemble <chr>,
#> #   is_immune <lgl>, subsets_Mito_percent <int>, subsets_Ribo_percent <int>,
#> #   high_mitochondrion <lgl>, high_ribosome <lgl>, scDblFinder.class <chr>,
#> #   sample_chunk <int>, cell_chunk <int>, sample_pseudobulk_chunk <int>, …
```

### Query pseudobulk
